prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年上海市综合类最低录取位次分别为约4880名→5198名→6028名→7218名→6814名，整体呈后移趋势（位次数字增大），近3年累计后移约786名；2025年基 准位次约6814名，较2024年峰值7218名有所回升，但仍高于2023年水平；该校在上海市综合类招生计划2021年为8人，2022–2025年均为7人；2026年计划为6人，较2025年缩招1人（-14.3%），缩招通常使录取位次数字减小（更易进），但需结合其他因素综合判断。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 北京外国语大学为211工程、双一 流建设高校，非985；软科中国大学主榜排名近年稳定在约第73–82名（2026年约第79名），属于全国语言类院校顶尖水平，层次认可度较高；2026年高考周期声 誉评价为偏负面，涉及考研名师田静学历造假等舆情事件，可能对报考心理产生一定负面影响；抖音热度排名第39位（较热），短视频曝光量中等偏上；2023年曾出现小语种专业 录取位次下降的投档异常信号，但影响已逐步消化；第五轮学科评估中，外国语言文学获评A+（全国顶尖），是该校唯一A-及以上学科，覆盖英语、德语、俄语 、翻译等全部招生专业，学科实力突出，对语言类考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 外语类专业2024年社会热度评估为"一般观望"，热度不高，报考意愿趋于平稳；新 闻传播学类社会热度为"明显劝退"，可能影响相关专业报考热度；上海市2026年高考考生总数约66700人（普通高考），较2025年49276人增加约35.4%，竞争显著加剧，是推高位 次数字的重要力量。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次后移趋势、2026年缩招1人（使位次数字减小）、上海市考生总数大幅增加约35%（使位 次数字增大）以及声誉偏负面等因素，考生总数激增带来的竞争加剧效应显著超过缩招的缓解作用，预计2026年录取位次在2025年基准6814名基础上略有上移；预测最低位次约67 30名，区间6230–7230名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 英语
- 英语（中国政法大学联合培养涉外法治人才）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 俄语（双学位）（俄语+大数据管理与应用双学位）
- 新闻传播学类（含新闻学、传播学、国际新闻与传播）
- 外交学。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约6730名，区间6230–7230名。位次在区间中上段（约6500名以内）可重点冲刺一档英语及联合培养专业；位次在区间中段（约6500–7000名）以二档德语为主力；位次 在区间下段（约7000名以后）建议以三档俄语双学位、新闻传播学类、外交学保底，其中俄语双学位因复合培养模式性价比相对较高。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for comprehensive subjects in Shanghai were approximately 4880 → 5198 → 6028 → 7218 → 6814, showing an overall backward trend (increasing ranking numbers), with a cumulative backward shift of about 786 places in the past 3 years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 6814, which has rebounded from the 2024 peak of 7218 but remains higher than the 2023 level; the enrollment plan for comprehensive subjects at this university in Shanghai was 8 students in 2021, and 7 students from 2022 to 2025; the 2026 plan is 6 students, a reduction of 1 student (-14.3%) compared to 2025, which typically makes the admission ranking number smaller (easier to enter), but needs to be combined with other factors for comprehensive judgment.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beijing Foreign Studies University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university, not a 985; its ranking in the Soft Science Chinese University Main Ranking has been stable at about 73rd to 82nd in recent years (about 79th in 2026), making it a top-level national language institution with high recognition; the reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is somewhat negative, involving public opinion events such as the academic fraud of postgraduate entrance exam teacher Tian Jing, which may have a certain negative impact on application psychology; Douyin popularity ranking is 39th (relatively hot), with medium to high short video exposure; in 2023, there was an abnormal signal of declining admission rankings for minor language majors, but the impact has been gradually absorbed; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Foreign Language and Literature was rated A+ (national top), the only A- or above discipline at this university, covering all enrollment majors such as English, German, Russian, and Translation, with outstanding disciplinary strength, strongly attracting language-oriented candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity evaluation of foreign language majors in 2024 is 'generally wait-and-see', with low popularity and stable application willingness; the social popularity of Journalism and Communication is 'clearly discouraged', which may affect the application enthusiasm for related majors; the total number of college entrance examination candidates in Shanghai in 2026 is about 66,700 (regular college entrance examination), an increase of about 35.4% compared to 49,276 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition, which is an important force pushing up the ranking number.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the historical backward trend of rankings, the reduction of 1 student in 2026 (making the ranking number smaller), the significant increase of about 35% in the total number of candidates in Shanghai (making the ranking number larger), and the negative reputation, the intensified competition effect from the surge in candidate numbers significantly outweighs the mitigating effect of the enrollment reduction. It is expected that the 2026 admission ranking will slightly increase from the 2025 baseline of 6814; the predicted minimum ranking is about 6730, with a range of 6230–7230.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- English
- English (China University of Political Science and Law Joint Training for Foreign-Related Rule of Law Talents).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Russian (Double Degree) (Russian + Big Data Management and Application Double Degree)
- Journalism and Communication (including Journalism, Communication, International Journalism and Communication)
- Diplomacy.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking about 6730, range 6230–7230. Candidates with rankings in the upper-middle part of the range (about within 6500) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 English and joint training majors; those with rankings in the middle part (about 6500–7000) should mainly target Tier 2 German; those with rankings in the lower part (after about 7000) are advised to use Tier 3 Russian double degree, Journalism and Communication, and Diplomacy as safety options, among which the Russian double degree has relatively high cost-effectiveness due to its composite training model.
